value.body:
## Summary
Add an approval mode to the chat input area so users can explicitly review and approve proposed actions before they are executed.

## Acceptance criteria
- Chat input exposes an approval mode control/state that is visible in the input area.
- Approval mode state is reflected in the message submission flow.
- Proposed action execution respects the selected approval mode.
- UI copy and interaction behavior are consistent with existing chat input patterns.
- Add or update tests for approval mode behavior where the chat input flow is covered.

frontmatter.title: Implement approval mode in chat input area

value.title: Implement approval mode in chat input area
